title: Settings

section.profileDesc: Basic company data and system language. The legal name and VAT number are set when the tenant is provisioned.
section.activeCompanyDesc: Your account is linked to multiple companies. Switch the one you are working on: the page will reload with the new company's data.
section.emailNotifDesc: Push notifications on the mobile app are always on (managed from the app). Here you choose, per category, which notifications to also receive by email. Off by default.

languageHint: The language is personal: it applies only to your account. It initially follows your browser (other languages fall back to English).
switchHint: Switching company will redirect you to the dashboard.

emailPref.emailLeaveDecisions: Outcomes of my requests (holiday, leave, absence)
